backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor defining all data types (academic entries, coding challenges, user profiles) and backend state; includes access control, blob storage mixin, and handlers for academic records, coding attempts, and user management.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two Subject Analysis features (per-grade subject averages and cross-grade subject averages) to their implementing files and associated components/test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Catalogue of short summaries for all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key implementation details of each component, hook, and utility in the React frontend.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with viewport/SEO meta tags and a root div that mounts the React application via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Top-level React component that handles authentication state, actor initialization, profile setup gating, and routes between Academic, Coding, Data, and User Management modules via a tab-based Header.
frontend/src/components/AcademicModule.t: Academic module container rendering six tabs (Add Marks, Progress, Subject Analysis, 9-Scale Grades, Combined %, Certificates), each wrapped in an ErrorBoundary for isolated error handling.
frontend/src/components/AddMarksForm.tsx: Marks entry form supporting all grades 1–12 with grade/term/stream selectors, Science and Commerce subgroup pickers, board exam mode, elective math selection, and AI substitution preview before submission.
Displays achievement certificate cards (Platinum/Gold/Silver/Bronze) for each grade/term based on a combined term percentage formula, with tier-specific styling and imagery.
frontend/src/components/CodingEditor.tsx: A Python coding editor component that lets users select a challenge, write and run code via Pyodide in-browser, and save their attempt with an optional score.
frontend/src/components/CodingHistory.ts: Displays a paginated accordion list of past coding attempts, showing challenge title, score badge, timestamp, submitted code, and output for each attempt.
frontend/src/components/CodingModule.tsx: A tabbed container component that wraps CodingEditor and CodingHistory in separate tabs, each protected by an ErrorBoundary.
frontend/src/components/CombinedPercenta: Shows per-grade and per-term combined percentages (calculated as (94 + original term %) / 2) along with overall grade averages, 9-scale grades, and certificate tier labels.
frontend/src/components/DataManagement.t: Provides export (JSON/CSV) and import functionality for academic entries, handling BigInt serialization and field-type conversion during round-trips.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: A React class-based error boundary that catches render errors and displays a fallback UI with a retry button, plus a withErrorBoundary HOC helper.
frontend/src/components/ErrorMessage.tsx: Reusable alert component that displays error, warning, or info messages with an optional retry button using lucide icons and shadcn Alert primitives.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component displaying a copyright notice and a link to caffeine.ai with an animated heart icon.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky app header with navigation buttons for Academic, Coding, Data, and admin Users modules, plus theme toggle and Internet Identity login/logout controls.
frontend/src/components/LoadingState.tsx: Configurable loading spinner component supporting small/medium/large sizes and an optional full-screen overlay mode.
frontend/src/components/NineScaleGradesV: Displays academic entries converted to a 9-point grading scale, grouped by grade and term, with grade/term filter dropdowns and color-coded badges per subject.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Form card that prompts a newly authenticated user to enter their name and saves it as their profile via the saveCallerUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/components/ProgressView.tsx: Academic progress dashboard showing line/bar charts and summary stats (average, highest, lowest) for term percentages, filterable by grade.
frontend/src/components/SubjectAnalysisV: Analyzes academic entries per subject, displaying per-grade and overall average percentages with 9-scale badges, filterable by grade and term.
frontend/src/components/UserManagement.t: React component that allows admins to assign roles (admin, user, guest) to users by entering their Principal ID, using the useAssignCallerUserRole mutation hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/usePyodide.ts: Custom hook that lazily loads the Pyodide WebAssembly Python runtime from CDN and exposes a runPython function that executes Python code and captures stdout/stderr output.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for the backend actor, covering academic entries, board exam results, grade aggregates, coding challenges, user profiles, and role assignment mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet that defines CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/lib/boardExam.ts: Utility library for board exam calculations, including Grade 10 AI subject substitution logic, total score computation, and encoding/decoding of subgroup metadata strings.
frontend/src/lib/frequencyPolygon.ts: Computes frequency distributions of academic entry percentages using 10-point class intervals, with helpers to filter by grade and term and to extract unique grades/terms.
frontend/src/lib/gradeCalculation.ts: Provides utilities for converting percentages to a nine-point grading scale, getting Tailwind color classes for scores, and calculating percentage from raw marks.
frontend/src/lib/maxMarks.ts: Defines grade-wise max marks configuration for all subjects (including variable Computer Science marks: 20 for grades 1–7, 30 for grade 8) and exposes helpers to retrieve subject lists and expected max marks per grade/term.
frontend/src/lib/percent.ts: Contains percentage calculation utilities including combined term percentage, adjusted/combined term formula ((94 + pct) / 2), overall grade averaging, and helpers for reading stored termPercentage from backend entries.
frontend/src/lib/subjectAnalysis.ts: Computes per-subject statistics (highest, lowest, average marks/percentages) from academic entries with optional grade/term filtering, and calculates per-grade and cross-grade subject averages.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, extended border radii, accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking existing features, pending feature requests (including Computer Science max marks fix and subject analysis averages), and architectural notes for the Academic Progress Tracker app.
